name: snipperapp
title: SnipperApp
description: Search, paste, and capture code snippets from your SnipperApp library and the SnipperApp Hub — with workspaces, favorites, and AI.
author: teologov

commands.name: search-snippets
commands.title: Search Snippets
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: Search your local SnipperApp library and copy, paste, or open a snippet. Filter by workspace, language, or favorites.

commands.name: create-snippet
commands.title: Create Snippet
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: Create a new snippet, prefilled from the clipboard or the current selection. Choose workspace, folder, and language.

commands.name: save-clipboard
commands.title: Save Clipboard as Snippet
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: Save the current clipboard contents as a new snippet in your last-used workspace.

commands.name: save-selection
commands.title: Save Selection as Snippet
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: Save the selected text in the frontmost app as a new snippet.

commands.name: recent-snippets
commands.title: Recent Snippets
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: Your most recently updated snippets, for instant re-access.

commands.name: paste-last
commands.title: Paste Last Snippet
commands.description: Paste the most recently used snippet into the frontmost app.

commands.name: search-hub
commands.title: Search Hub
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp Hub
commands.description: Search public community snippets on the SnipperApp Hub and add them to your library.

commands.name: browse-trending
commands.title: Browse Trending
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp Hub
commands.description: Browse trending community snippets on the SnipperApp Hub.

commands.name: snippets-menu-bar
commands.title: Snippets Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: SnipperApp
commands.description: A menu-bar menu of your favorite and recent snippets for one-click copy.

tools.name: search-snippets
tools.title: Search Snippets
tools.description: Search the user's local SnipperApp library by query, language, or favorites. Returns snippet summaries with a content preview.

tools.name: get-snippet
tools.title: Get Snippet
tools.description: Get the full content of a local snippet by its id.

tools.name: create-snippet
tools.title: Create Snippet
tools.description: Create a new snippet in the user's local SnipperApp library.

tools.name: search-hub
tools.title: Search Hub
tools.description: Search public community snippets on the SnipperApp Hub.

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Snippet Action: Primary
preferences.description: The first action in a snippet's action menu.

preferences.name: secondaryAction
preferences.title: Snippet Action: Secondary
preferences.description: The second action in a snippet's action menu.

preferences.name: enableFrecency
preferences.title: Result Ranking
preferences.label: Rank by usage (frecency)
preferences.description: Float your most frequently and recently used snippets to the top.

preferences.name: showWorkspace
preferences.title: List Accessories
preferences.label: Show workspace
preferences.description: Show the workspace as an accessory in the snippet list.

preferences.name: showLanguage
preferences.label: Show language
preferences.description: Show the language as an accessory in the snippet list.

preferences.name: trackHubAnalytics
preferences.title: Hub Analytics
preferences.label: Send anonymous view/import events to the Hub
preferences.description: Helps snippet authors see how their snippets are used. No personal data is sent.

preferences.name: helperPath
preferences.title: Helper Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the snipper-mcp helper inside SnipperApp. Detected automatically; override only if needed.
